title: Veep

jokes.text: Did we win? - Oh, yeah. I'm the president, and you're the First Lady. Oh, we would crush it.
jokes.setup: Asking if they won when they clearly didn't get enough delegates
jokes.punchline: Sarcastic response about being president and First Lady when they lost
jokes.explanation: Decent irony about losing while pretending to celebrate

jokes.text: You know, it's worse having to hear it from Mike.
jokes.setup: News about the deadlocked convention
jokes.punchline: Complaining it's worse hearing bad news from Mike specifically
jokes.explanation: Character-specific dig at Mike's incompetence, shows Selina's priorities

jokes.text: Guys, who gives a shit where people shit? That is literally the point, Mother.
jokes.setup: Catherine complaining about North Carolina's bathroom bill
jokes.punchline: Selina's crude dismissal followed by Catherine pointing out the literal meaning
jokes.explanation: Decent wordplay on 'shit' with mother-daughter dynamic

jokes.text: I'll whip the whips, ma'am.
jokes.setup: Discussion about contacting floor whips
jokes.punchline: Gary's enthusiastic doubling down on the whip terminology
jokes.explanation: Simple wordplay but predictable and low-stakes

jokes.text: I'm not here. Not hearing this.
jokes.setup: Discussion about Chinese election fixing
jokes.punchline: Ben's obvious discomfort with illegal activity
jokes.explanation: Character beat showing Ben's discomfort with corruption

jokes.text: Oh, my God, is that still a thing?
jokes.setup: Mentioning Roman Catholic as an electoral asset
jokes.punchline: Selina's surprise that being Catholic still matters politically
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's disconnect from religious voters

jokes.text: Yeah, most importantly, he has a penis. Right, Governor?
jokes.setup: Listing DeVito's qualifications
jokes.punchline: Reducing it all to having male genitalia and asking for confirmation
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortably blunt about gender politics in voting

jokes.text: Might want to double-check that penis. That's Kent's job.
jokes.setup: Previous penis comment
jokes.punchline: Suggesting Kent should verify genitalia as part of his research role
jokes.explanation: Escalates the penis joke while staying true to Kent's data-obsessed character

jokes.text: Oh, no, Beautiful Mindfuck. You are not gonna desecrate my convention with more of this Muslim math nonsense.
jokes.setup: Jonah challenging the official count
jokes.punchline: Furlong's racist dismissal calling it 'Muslim math'
jokes.explanation: Shows Furlong's crude prejudices, though relies on shock value

jokes.text: Because you were born with three umbilical cords wrapped around your neck, Hep C Kevin McHale.
jokes.setup: Jonah asking about different math results
jokes.punchline: Incredibly specific insult about birth defects and basketball comparison
jokes.explanation: Bizarrely specific and creative insult that's both medical and pop culture

jokes.text: Stealing South Carolina is the bedrock of our political system, Senator.
jokes.setup: Accusations of stealing South Carolina
jokes.punchline: Treating election fraud as foundational to democracy
jokes.explanation: Dark political satire delivered with perfect deadpan confidence

jokes.text: If you can't figure out how to steal South Carolina, you have no business being president.
jokes.setup: Previous comment about stealing being foundational
jokes.punchline: Selina doubling down that election fraud is a required presidential skill
jokes.explanation: Escalates the corruption theme while showing Selina's moral flexibility

jokes.text: Right now, every Sunday pundit and poli-sci major is treating this brokered convention like it's a big-titted college gymnast whose daddy fucked with her just enough that she'll do some dirty shit, but she can still cum.
jokes.setup: Describing media coverage of the convention
jokes.punchline: Extremely graphic sexual metaphor involving abuse
jokes.explanation: Shocking and characteristic of Furlong but relies heavily on shock value over craft

jokes.text: Hittin' a little close to home there, Roger, minus the big-titted part.
jokes.setup: Furlong's sexual metaphor
jokes.punchline: Selina relating it to herself but correcting the breast size detail
jokes.explanation: Self-deprecating response to crude metaphor with specific correction

jokes.text: But if we don't pillow-smother this sad grandma of a convention lickity-fuckin'-split, we are gonna wind up with four more years of Montez clogging up the White House plumbing with tampons.
jokes.setup: Need to resolve the convention quickly
jokes.punchline: Bizarre metaphor about murdering grandmas and tampon plumbing
jokes.explanation: Typical Furlong vulgarity but rambling and unfocused

jokes.text: And may the hairiest man zip-tie me to a slaughterhouse drainage grate and make tender hate to my rear and mouth, in that order, at his leisure.
jokes.setup: Standard 'may the best man win' sentiment
jokes.punchline: Extremely graphic sexual fantasy as a response
jokes.explanation: Shows Will's sexual submissiveness but relies on shock over craft

jokes.text: You and Kemi scissoring at the top of the ticket is gonna make everyone rock hard.
jokes.setup: Suggesting a unity ticket with Kemi
jokes.punchline: Crude sexual reference to lesbian activity
jokes.explanation: Typical Furlong crudeness but lacks creativity or surprise

jokes.text: Your voice is like a crow.
jokes.setup: Amy trying to talk to Selina
jokes.punchline: Blunt comparison of Amy's voice to a harsh bird sound
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective insult with good economy

jokes.text: There is no place for Jonah Ryan in my administration. Or anywhere in the universe where the building blocks of life are present.
jokes.setup: Rejecting Jonah for her administration
jokes.punchline: Expanding to reject him from all of existence
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation from political rejection to cosmic banishment

jokes.text: Your offer is as appealing as a Sriracha enema.
jokes.setup: Rejecting a political offer
jokes.punchline: Comparing it to an extremely unpleasant medical procedure
jokes.explanation: Vivid and unpleasant comparison that's both specific and gross

jokes.text: You just broke North Carolina's transgender bathroom law.
jokes.setup: Congratulating Selina on something
jokes.punchline: Revealing she accidentally violated anti-trans legislation
jokes.explanation: Good irony about accidentally becoming a progressive hero

jokes.text: New York Times? Krugman is positively creaming his khakis.
jokes.setup: Media coverage of the bathroom incident
jokes.punchline: Richard's innocent but graphic description of excitement
jokes.explanation: Richard's oblivious sexual language fits his character perfectly

jokes.text: The Ukraine. - A Wisconsin sister state.
jokes.setup: Asked what state he's a delegate from
jokes.punchline: Says Ukraine, Richard responds as if it's a US state
jokes.explanation: Richard's geographic confusion played for absurdist effect

jokes.text: Why does everybody get good at their job after I fire them?
jokes.setup: Learning Leon is doing good work for Kemi
jokes.punchline: Self-aware observation about her management style
jokes.explanation: Self-aware joke about her poor leadership that rings true

jokes.text: In the words of the great Eleanor Roosevelt, I would rather cheese-grater my clit.
jokes.setup: Invoking Eleanor Roosevelt for wisdom
jokes.punchline: Attributing graphic sexual violence to the former First Lady
jokes.explanation: Excellent misdirection joke subverting inspirational quote expectations

jokes.text: Oh, no, ma'am. I'm a cis woman. - Right. That's not a crazy question to ask.
jokes.setup: Selina apparently questioning Catherine's gender identity
jokes.punchline: Awkward clarification and defensive response
jokes.explanation: Cringe moment about gender assumptions between mother and daughter

jokes.text: You and your gay pals can make me the grand marshal of the next parade that you have that messes up all the traffic.
jokes.setup: Catherine praising her for trans rights
jokes.punchline: Selina's grudging acceptance focused on traffic inconvenience
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's self-interest even when being progressive

jokes.text: How'd she feel about tedious lesbians? Big fan, ma'am.
jokes.setup: Discussion about Gertrude Stein's views on gay men
jokes.punchline: Selina's pointed question about tedious lesbians, Catherine's oblivious response
jokes.explanation: Selina's passive-aggressive dig at Catherine's lecturing

jokes.text: This is why everyone should just fly private.
jokes.setup: News about explosives found at Kennedy Airport
jokes.punchline: Selina's privileged response to terrorism concerns
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Selina's disconnection from normal concerns

jokes.text: Is he... Ah! And there he is!
jokes.setup: Waiting for DeVito to arrive
jokes.punchline: Apparent confusion about his presence, then recognition
jokes.explanation: Visual confusion gag, likely about DeVito's height or presence

jokes.text: Pretend to talk to me about numbers. - I was pretending. My favorite number is Euler's number.
jokes.setup: Ben asking Kent to fake a conversation
jokes.punchline: Kent's literal interpretation involving mathematical constants
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kent moment - taking fake conversation seriously with mathematical precision

jokes.text: And by 'hell,' I mean The Kennedy School.
jokes.setup: Saying Kemi can suck dick in hell
jokes.punchline: Clarifying hell means Harvard Kennedy School
jokes.explanation: Sharp political insider joke about academia as hell for failed politicians

jokes.text: Oh, please. Buddy's not flirting with anything that's not wearing a leather vest and a Nazi cap.
jokes.setup: Suggestion that Buddy is flirting with endorsing Kemi
jokes.punchline: Implying Buddy only flirts with Nazi-adjacent gay men
jokes.explanation: Dark joke about closeted politician's specific sexual preferences

jokes.text: I want that person that I'm next to, to be a man, or, better yet, lots of men. Glory, glory, hole-elujah.
jokes.setup: Buddy explaining his bathroom preferences
jokes.punchline: Inadvertently describing gay cruising with religious language
jokes.explanation: Brilliant closeted character joke with religious pun on 'glory hole'

jokes.text: Glory, glory, hole-elujah.
jokes.setup: Buddy's accidental revelation about wanting to be around men
jokes.punchline: Selina's pun on 'hallelujah' with 'glory hole'
jokes.explanation: Perfect wordplay pun that captures both religious and sexual themes with maximum economy.

jokes.text: ABC News is doing a piece on presidential also-rans who can almost suck their own dicks.
jokes.setup: Jonah suggesting Dan talk to ABC
jokes.punchline: Describing it as a story about auto-fellatio attempts
jokes.explanation: Jonah's crude taunt that fits his juvenile character

jokes.text: When you listen to rumors, you rue more than... Nope. I don't know where I was going with that.
jokes.setup: Richard attempting a clever saying
jokes.punchline: Realizing mid-sentence he has no idea how to finish it
jokes.explanation: Perfect Richard moment - earnest attempt at wisdom that collapses

jokes.text: What's wrong with the suit? - Oh, it's not network.
jokes.setup: Dan asking about his expensive suit
jokes.punchline: Richard's innocent explanation that it's not TV-appropriate
jokes.explanation: Richard's innocent expertise in TV production contrasted with Dan's vanity

jokes.text: Have Jonah instruct his delegates of Dr. Moreau to back me
jokes.setup: Asking Amy to get Jonah's delegates
jokes.punchline: Referring to them as creations of Dr. Moreau
jokes.explanation: Literary reference comparing Jonah's supporters to mutant abominations

jokes.text: So are a lot of people's.
jokes.setup: Description of terrorist's Facebook page about Islam and trigonometry
jokes.punchline: Ben's matter-of-fact observation about math teachers
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan response to terrorist profiling paranoia

jokes.text: Jonah was right. He was spectacularly right! And you know what that makes me, sister? - Spitty?
jokes.setup: Amy building up to a grand revelation about herself
jokes.punchline: Kent's confused guess about her being spitty
jokes.explanation: Kent's literal-mindedness perfectly deflates Amy's dramatic moment

jokes.text: This is a horrific country that is falling apart because it is full of people who are different than me.
jokes.setup: Jonah giving a campaign speech
jokes.punchline: Accidentally honest xenophobic platform statement
jokes.explanation: Jonah's accidentally honest bigotry that reveals his true platform

jokes.text: I thought you told my mom to sell me to a child molester and use the money to get her tubes tied.
jokes.setup: Uncle Jeff claiming he always believed in Jonah
jokes.punchline: Jonah's memory of extremely dark family advice
jokes.explanation: Shockingly dark family history that explains Jonah's damage

jokes.text: You know, the Jews have a word for this feeling I'm having right now. I can't remember it. It sounds like three Germans cumming real hard inside something that doesn't want them to.
jokes.setup: Jeff describing his emotional state
jokes.punchline: Bizarre fake etymology involving German sexual assault
jokes.explanation: Relies too heavily on shock value and ethnic stereotypes

jokes.text: Listen, you Subaru-driving bull dykes! You better back Jonah on the next ballot, or you will be leaf-peeping from inside your own maple syrup-soaked assholes!
jokes.setup: Jeff promising to sweet-talk Vermont delegates
jokes.punchline: Immediate shift to violent threats using Vermont stereotypes
jokes.explanation: Good escalation from diplomacy to threats with Vermont-specific imagery

jokes.text: I'll give 'em five minutes, then I'll hit 'em with bad cop.
jokes.setup: Jeff just delivered an extremely aggressive threat
jokes.punchline: He thinks that was the 'good cop' approach
jokes.explanation: Good escalation comedy - if that was good cop, what could bad cop possibly be?

jokes.text: And just tell 'em they can violate me with their assault rifles and a full slab of ribs on top of a stack of slavery-free history textbooks.
jokes.setup: Trying to appeal to Texas delegates
jokes.punchline: Bizarre sexual offer involving Texas stereotypes
jokes.explanation: Shows Selina's desperation but relies too heavily on shock and stereotype

jokes.text: Why is this so hard? I just wanna be president.
jokes.setup: Multiple crises mounting against her
jokes.punchline: Petulant reduction of complex situation to personal desire
jokes.explanation: Perfect childish entitlement in the face of serious consequences

jokes.text: That's not fucking funny, Kent. - I haven't been funny since 1987.
jokes.setup: Selina angry at Kent for suggesting she be VP
jokes.punchline: Kent's matter-of-fact response about his humor timeline
jokes.explanation: Perfect Kent line - accidentally funny while denying being funny, with specific date

jokes.text: We ruled out beets because he doesn't know what those are. Then had to rule it right back in for the same reason.
jokes.setup: Investigating why Jonah's urine is pink
jokes.punchline: Logical circle about Jonah's ignorance of vegetables
jokes.explanation: Brilliant circular logic about Jonah's stupidity creating investigative paradox

jokes.text: This whole Meyer Fund story is a distraction, sir, the way a magician does tricks to distract you from how depressing his life is.
jokes.setup: Downplaying the Meyer Fund scandal
jokes.punchline: Comparing it to magicians' sad personal lives
jokes.explanation: Unexpected metaphor about magicians' depression, moderately clever

jokes.text: Oh, my God! Oh, my God! He's having a heart attack! - Eighth time's the charm.
jokes.setup: Panic about Ben having a heart attack
jokes.punchline: Kent's calm statistical observation about Ben's cardiac history
jokes.explanation: Kent's inappropriate statistical response to medical emergency

jokes.text: One of the nice things about being dead is, it gives you time to think. Also, fewer telemarketers.
jokes.setup: Tom describing being politically dead
jokes.punchline: Practical benefits of death including telemarketing relief
jokes.explanation: Clever observation about death's mundane advantages

jokes.text: What do you think I'm trying to do?
jokes.setup: Crowd chanting 'Run, Tom, run!'
jokes.punchline: Tom's exasperated response about already running
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective response to redundant crowd chanting

jokes.text: I honestly think I might be in hell. - No such place, ma'am. The concept of hell is a cultural memory of pre-Mosaic child sacrifice among proto-Judean peoples.
jokes.setup: Selina expressing despair
jokes.punchline: Kent's academic lecture on hell's anthropological origins
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Kent response - pedantic anthropology lecture during crisis

jokes.text: It's what he always wanted.
jokes.setup: News that Ben might be put in medically induced coma
jokes.punchline: Suggesting this was Ben's life goal
jokes.explanation: Dark joke about Ben's apparent desire for unconsciousness

jokes.text: The party and the nation will never forget all that door you pushed open, yes, backwards and in heels.
jokes.setup: Praising Selina's historical impact
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment about doing things wrong in inappropriate footwear
jokes.explanation: Polite but cutting assessment of Selina's backwards achievements

jokes.text: Wipe that grin-eating dick off your face.
jokes.setup: Tom smirking after their conversation
jokes.punchline: Garbled insult mixing facial expressions with sexual imagery
jokes.explanation: Selina's frustrated attempt at a cutting insult that gets confused

jokes.text: You know, I've had a dozen heart attacks, and... You know, if I play my cards right, I'll have a dozen more, but I think this is my last rodeo.
jokes.setup: Ben reflecting on his health
jokes.punchline: Treating future heart attacks as a goal while acknowledging mortality
jokes.explanation: Ben's darkly optimistic view of his cardiac future

jokes.text: I mean, I could really use the break.
jokes.setup: Asking Selina not to tell his family about his condition
jokes.punchline: Admitting he wants a break from his family
jokes.explanation: Dark domestic humor about using medical crisis to avoid family

jokes.text: That's not a problem. I've never met 'em.
jokes.setup: Ben asking her not to tell his family
jokes.punchline: Selina revealing she doesn't even know his family exists
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina moment showing her complete disinterest in others' personal lives

jokes.text: I mean, that Nutmeg State indefinable really turns my hydrant on.
jokes.setup: Talking about someone from Connecticut
jokes.punchline: Crude sexual metaphor with oddly specific state nickname
jokes.explanation: Crude humor with regional flavor but lacks wit. Goes for shock value over cleverness.

jokes.text: The only difference is, that I was the most exciting conquest of his life, and you just had the motel room closest to the ice machine.
jokes.setup: Comparing her relationship with Tom to his aide's
jokes.punchline: Reducing the aide's value to mere convenience proximity
jokes.explanation: Cutting comparison using vivid motel imagery to demean rival

jokes.text: You are a terrible campaign manager.
jokes.setup: Amy refusing to help with Jonah VP plan
jokes.punchline: Selina's blunt assessment of Amy's abilities
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective character beat about their relationship

jokes.text: 'Innocent young woman.' That's hilarious, don't you think? But that girl doesn't exist anymore. She's dead. Murdered by Tom James.
jokes.setup: Watching fake sexual harassment testimony
jokes.punchline: Selina's appreciation for the theatrical victimhood
jokes.explanation: Dark humor showing Selina's appreciation for political manipulation, even fake sexual assault claims.

jokes.text: He is not just gay, he is Sam Rayburn gay.
jokes.setup: Discussing Governor Calhoun's obvious homosexuality
jokes.punchline: Reference to notoriously closeted mid-century politician
jokes.explanation: Good historical political reference that adds depth to the closeted politician joke.

jokes.text: Being vice president is like being declawed, defanged, neutered, ball-gagged, and sealed in an abandoned coal mine under two miles of human shit!
jokes.setup: Explaining why VP is safe for Jonah
jokes.punchline: Extremely detailed metaphor for VP powerlessness
jokes.explanation: Vivid escalating metaphor showing Selina's view of VP role from experience

jokes.text: Besides, I'm not gonna die, 'cause I got the heart and the twat of a high school cheerleader who's only done anal!
jokes.setup: Explaining why she'll survive longer than Jonah
jokes.punchline: Graphic comparison of her vitality to a specific type of teenager
jokes.explanation: Selina's crude but confident assertion about her health using sexual metaphor

jokes.text: She is offering you vice president, you monument to vaginal dryness.
jokes.setup: Jonah not understanding the offer
jokes.punchline: Creative insult about his effect on women
jokes.explanation: Creative anatomical insult suggesting Jonah's anti-aphrodisiac properties

jokes.text: You pile of failure shaped like a rapist! - I am not shaped like a rapist!
jokes.setup: Amy insulting Jonah's appearance and character
jokes.punchline: Jonah's defensive response focusing only on the shape aspect
jokes.explanation: Jonah's literal response missing the broader insult

jokes.text: You know, feminism.
jokes.setup: Explaining why he wants Dan fired as an apology
jokes.punchline: Claiming this random act represents feminism
jokes.explanation: Jonah's completely wrong understanding of feminism principles

jokes.text: Can you believe I'm having to deal with this right now?
jokes.setup: Catherine confronting her about gay marriage during celebration
jokes.punchline: Selina's self-centered complaint about timing
jokes.explanation: Selina treating moral crisis as personal inconvenience

jokes.text: It's like a to-do list of things we're not gonna do.
jokes.setup: Catherine upset about party platform promises
jokes.punchline: Cynical but accurate description of political platforms
jokes.explanation: Perfect cynical observation about political promises with great economy

jokes.text: Oh, well, if I had a dollar for every 'Mother, I will never forgive you...' Bazillionaire. Correct.
jokes.setup: Catherine saying she'll never forgive Selina
jokes.punchline: Selina's casual count of forgiveness crises confirmed by Kent
jokes.explanation: Good mother-daughter dysfunction comedy with Kent's mathematical confirmation adding perfect deadpan support.

jokes.text: Started from the bottom, now we here.
jokes.setup: Asked why he's helping Selina
jokes.punchline: Quoting Drake lyrics inappropriately
jokes.explanation: Typical Jonah inappropriate pop culture reference

jokes.text: It's stickier than a red wine-and-curry dump.
jokes.setup: Describing how the Meyer Fund scandal won't go away
jokes.punchline: Extremely specific and disgusting comparative metaphor
jokes.explanation: Will's characteristic gross-out metaphor for political persistence

jokes.text: Little chia seed.
jokes.setup: Gary helping Selina with something in her teeth
jokes.punchline: Identifying the specific tiny object
jokes.explanation: Gary's attentive care extending to dietary details

jokes.text: Waking up in a hotel bed... - That DeVito's a hell of a speechwriter.
jokes.setup: Selina reading speech that should say 'hospital bed in Kabul'
jokes.punchline: Gary's sarcastic praise for DeVito after obvious mistake
jokes.explanation: Gary's dry response to Selina reading wrong speech version

jokes.text: You're gonna be Jonah's chief of staff.
jokes.setup: Amy congratulating Selina on winning
jokes.punchline: Selina's punishment assignment for Amy
jokes.explanation: Selina's petty revenge disguised as career opportunity

jokes.text: He's a super Veep. Super Veep, he's super Veepy. Yow!
jokes.setup: Jonah celebrating becoming VP
jokes.punchline: Terrible improvised superhero theme song
jokes.explanation: Characteristic Jonah self-aggrandizement but the execution is weak and cringeworthy rather than funny.

jokes.text: The President told me to pencil you in to half past go-fuck-yourself.
jokes.setup: Jonah demanding meeting with President
jokes.punchline: Sue's creative scheduling response
jokes.explanation: Perfect Sue line - professional format delivering profane rejection

jokes.text: God damn it! I'm just gonna pop my head in.
jokes.setup: Sue blocking his access to the President
jokes.punchline: Jonah's impotent threat to slightly violate protocol
jokes.explanation: Shows Jonah's powerlessness as VP but the comedy is more about his pathetic position than any clever writing.

jokes.text: David, I have to tell you, my daughter Catherine was exactly the same way, a whiner. Yeah...
jokes.setup: Taking call from Israeli PM about Palestinian issues
jokes.punchline: Comparing Palestinian protesters to her whining daughter
jokes.explanation: Selina's inappropriate personal comparison during international crisis

jokes.text: Maybe because he has two testicles.
jokes.setup: Question about Mike having more hair
jokes.punchline: Dan's crude medical theory about testosterone
jokes.explanation: Dan's characteristic crude observation about masculinity

jokes.text: I think the last time I saw you, your wife was being born.
jokes.setup: Dan greeting Amy after years
jokes.punchline: Joke about Amy's husband being much younger
jokes.explanation: Dan's cutting observation about age gap relationships

jokes.text: Look at you losers waitin' around to make sure she's actually dead, while you sit in the back row suckin' on hard candies like what, Will?
jokes.setup: At Selina's funeral
jokes.punchline: Furlong's crude assessment of the mourners
jokes.explanation: Characteristic Furlong crudeness but the setting makes it more uncomfortable than funny.

jokes.text: You'd hate the flowers.
jokes.setup: Gary visiting Selina's grave
jokes.punchline: Speaking to her as if she's still concerned about aesthetics
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary moment - still attending to Selina's preferences in death

jokes.text: You'd hate the flowers. But I... I brought the Dubonnet.
jokes.setup: Gary at Selina's grave
jokes.punchline: He brought her favorite discontinued lipstick to her funeral
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gary devotion moment that's both touching and absurd. Great callback to earlier lipstick conversation.

jokes.text: Typical.
jokes.setup: Soldiers having trouble with Selina's casket mechanism
jokes.punchline: Richard's matter-of-fact response to funeral difficulties
jokes.explanation: Richard's understated reaction suggesting even death can't go smoothly for Selina

jokes.text: I've just been told that four-time Academy Award-winning actor Tom Hanks has died at the age of 88.
jokes.setup: Mike about to deliver heartfelt eulogy for Selina
jokes.punchline: Breaking news about Tom Hanks interrupts and overshadows her funeral
jokes.explanation: Perfect final insult to Selina - even in death, she's upstaged by a beloved actor. Great structural comedy about media priorities.

tmdb_overview: The nominating fight between Selina and her rivals reaches its climax, as their race comes to a historic finish. Series finale.
insight: Series finale delivers 90 jokes in 90 minutes but underperforms at 72—character comedy peaks while bite dulls.
